message:
Add CI workflow for build and test on push and PRs

Runs go build, go vet, and go test -short on every push to main
and every pull request. Short mode skips integration tests that
require API keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  build-and-test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version-file: go.mod
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: go build ./...
+
+      - name: Vet
+        run: go vet ./...
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: go test -short -count=1 ./...
